'''nathara''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:plagiarhythm|plagiarhythm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-th-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:plagiarhythm|plagiarhythm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nathara
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næthæræth|næthæræth]] || [[word:næthæræj|næthæræj]] || [[word:næthæræsh|næthæræsh]] || [[word:næthæræ|næthæræ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nathatharath|nathatharath]] || [[word:nathatharaj|nathatharaj]] || [[word:nathatharash|nathatharash]] || [[word:nathathara|nathathara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:natharath|natharath]] || [[word:natharaj|natharaj]] || [[word:natharash|natharash]] || [[word:nathara|nathara]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nathafrath|nathafrath]] || [[word:nathafraj|nathafraj]] || [[word:nathafrash|nathafrash]] || [[word:nathafraf|nathafraf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:natharatha|natharatha]] || [[word:natharaja|natharaja]] || [[word:natharasha|natharasha]] || [[word:natharaka|natharaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:natharath|natharath]] || [[word:natharaj|natharaj]] || [[word:natharash|natharash]] || [[word:nathara|nathara]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:natharathal|natharathal]] || [[word:natharajal|natharajal]] || [[word:natharashal|natharashal]] || [[word:natharakal|natharakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:natharathatha|natharathatha]] || [[word:natharajaja|natharajaja]] || [[word:natharashasha|natharashasha]] || [[word:natharaka|natharaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:natharathan|natharathan]] || [[word:natharajan|natharajan]] || [[word:natharashan|natharashan]] || [[word:natharakan|natharakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:natharathaoro|natharathaoro]] || [[word:natharajaoro|natharajaoro]] || [[word:natharashaoro|natharashaoro]] || [[word:natharakaoro|natharakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
